title: Always Measure Your Ring Size in the Evening (Here Is Why)
description: Fingers are smallest in the morning and largest at night. Temperature matters too — cold shrinks, warm swells. For sizes 2-4, half a size is less than 1.3mm. title: The Proportion Rule: Why Thin Bands Look Better on Small Fingers
description: On a size 2 finger, a 1mm band looks elegant. A 4mm band overwhelms. The rule: band width should be less than 1/3 of your finger width. title: Petite Jewelry Shopping Checklist (Save This!)
